event_notes: General meet results and WIOL championship results appear separately in the issue for the same event date/venue.
event_comments:
Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1994/1996 deep review) updated canonical event metadata. Reason: The Feb. 22, 1997 Hamlin Park row is the actual WIOL Championships target for the November 1996 schedule citation.
